caption:
Is this the best view in London? 👇

📍Horsleydown Steps

When the tide is out, you can even walk down onto a little “beach” area and get even closer to Tower Bridge 😎  Do you know any other cool viewpoints in London? Share ‘em in a comment 🤝  A few of my favourites include Primrose Hill, Skygarden or Horizon 22, Greenwich Observatory and the café at Tate Modern 🙌
 Btw, I’ve written a free e-book where I share all my top London advice; send me a DM that says “London”, and I’ll share the link 🇬🇧

#london #towerbridge #londontravel #visitlondon
